summary.intent: Implement three GitHub issues (#297, #298, #299) adding the framework-agnostic core of 8 color components (ColorSwatch, ColorField, ColorArea, ColorSlider, ColorWheel, AngleSlider, ColorSwatchPicker) plus shared ColorValue types to the ars-ui Rust component library.
summary.outcome: All 8 components implemented and pushed as PR #698 (44 files, ~10k lines), with 10 rounds of Codex code review completed (50+ findings addressed with TDD fixes and spec sync each round). PR is CI-green and awaiting Codex final approval before user-authorized merge.

repo: core_maths::CoreFloat is the workspace's established no_std float tool; must be used in FQ form (CoreFloat::method(x)) matching ars-i18n convention. CoreFloat lacks min/max — need private fmin/fmax helpers.
ars-core is built --no-default-features (no_std) in CI (feature_matrix.rs:56) — transcendental float requires core_maths dep (needs user approval per CLAUDE.md).

Machine controlled-mode pattern: ctx.value is Bindable<T>; get() returns stale controlled prop; pending() returns staged internal value (set via set()); display attrs and keyboard accumulation must use pending().

Drag machines follow adapter-driven pattern: adapter wires DragMove/DragEnd from pointer listeners; core transitions Idle<->Dragging; on_change_end fires via typed Effect::ChangeEnd on DragEnd (spec's use_platform_effects/track_pointer_drag are nonexistent APIs).
Controlled-mode prop sync requires on_props_changed + SyncValue/SetProps events; disabled guard must let prop syncs through; DragEnd must bypass disabled/readonly guards to terminate in-flight drags.
Snapshot count gate (xci-fast) requires >=1 snapshot per state variant.
Coverage CI uses cargo +nightly llvm-cov nextest --branch --workspace (not -p); workspace flag adds ~1.1% vs per-crate run. ars-components enforces 90% line AND 90% branch thresholds.
ComponentPart with f64 fields (e.g. AngleSlider Marker { value: f64 }) requires manual derive since f64 isn't Eq/Hash — use to_bits() for Hash.
SyncValue for hue/tracked-value fields must preserve the 360 degree endpoint when the incoming parent color matches the pending color.
xci-fast is 10 gates: fmt, check, clippy, unit, integration, adapter, spec-compile-snippets, error-variant-coverage, mutual-exclusion, snapshot-count.

code.finding: ColorValue::new only debug_asserts finiteness; release builds let NaN/inf through. Fix: coerce non-finite components to 0.0 before wrap/clamp.
from_hex used trim_start_matches('#') which strips ALL leading #, accepting ##3366ff. Fix: strip_prefix('#').unwrap_or(hex).
MessageFn only has From impls for a fixed set of signatures; new color message signatures require explicit From<F> impl additions per signature type.

Bindable::pending() needed as read-only accessor for staged internal value — essential for drag callbacks and controlled-mode display. get() returns stale controlled prop; pending() returns what set() staged.
format_value showed percentage channels as 0-1 scale; commit_input clamped user input 50 to 1.0. Fix: multiply by 100 in format, divide by 100 in parse.
IME composing branch handled Change before readonly/disabled guards. Fix: guard on ctx.readonly || ctx.disabled.
SetProps updated channel/format but left ctx.input_text stale. Fix: reformat input_text from pending() value with new channel/format when not focused.
Drag change-end effects read stale ctx.value.get(). Fix: capture pending() and pass into ChangeEnd effect.
RTL mirrored arrows/render but DragStart/DragMove still mapped physical 0.0->min. Fix: invert normalized position (1.0-pos) for horizontal RTL. Same pattern in color_area x-axis.
Alpha track gradient started with CSS transparent (transparent black), fading through black. Fix: use hsl with alpha=0 for first stop. RTL gradient needs 'to left' direction.
% operator gives negative remainders in Rust for negative operands. Fix: rem_euclid(360.0). SetToMax wrote hue:360 bypassing ColorValue::new normalization — fix: track unwrapped hue_value separately.
Wheel thumb set aria-labelledby to a *-label id but ColorWheel has no Label part — dangling IDREF. Fix: drop aria-labelledby.
Disabled guard rejected Blur, leaving machine stuck in Focused state. Fix: Blur must bypass disabled guard.
Blur cleared focus flags but left focused_index set. Fix: gate focused styling on State::Focused.
FocusUp/Down with columns:0 is no-op (divide by zero). Fix: clamp columns to >=1 before row navigation.
SetProps updated min/max but left value out-of-range, leaking stale aria-valuenow. Fix: re-clamp value to new bounds in SetProps arm.
f64::clamp panics when min > max or bound is NaN. Fix: clamp_to_range helper that guards non-finite/inverted bounds.

workflow: Every Codex review finding must be TDD-first before spec sync — proved critical for catching assertion correctness.
Spec files must be synced after every code change affecting the public contract; spec-sync was delegated to a subagent to protect main context window.
Background task watchers for polling in zsh: status is read-only — use cov_state or another variable name.
A single spec-sync subagent can be resumed via SendMessage for multiple rounds rather than spawning a new agent each time.
CI coverage command is cargo +nightly llvm-cov nextest --branch --workspace — --workspace matters for accurate measurement vs per-crate -p runs.
Codex review loop: fetch unresolved threads -> task-track findings -> implement TDD -> spec sync -> xci-fast -> push -> reply/resolve all threads -> re-trigger -> background-watch -> repeat.

friction: core_maths::CoreFloat lacks min/max — required private fmin/fmax helpers
MessageFn has no generic mechanism; each new message signature needs a manual From<F> impl
Spec's drag APIs (use_platform_effects, track_pointer_drag) are nonexistent — had to reverse-engineer correct pattern from slider reference code
Extensive spec drift across 8 component specs required large-scale reconciliation before and after implementation
color_field::has_description flag had no setter (dead branch) — discovered only during branch coverage measurement, required adding a new event
xci-fast snapshot-count gate caught AngleSlider missing snapshots for all 3 states after initial commit attempt
Pre-existing pagination/mod.rs clippy lint on stable 1.96 blocked the clippy gate (unrelated to the task)
Codex was rate-limited on first trigger — 'reached your Codex usage limits for code reviews'
Coverage CI failed (branch 89.7% < 90%) after initial push — required a second commit with both-arms tests
zsh status variable is read-only, crashed background CI watcher script
10 rounds of Codex review (50+ findings) — many legitimate deep edge cases discovered incrementally as fixes exposed new gaps
SyncValue endpoint-preservation required per-machine logic to detect incoming parent color matching pending value
f64::clamp panics on inverted bounds/NaN — required defensive clamp_to_range wrapper
open_items: PR #698 awaiting Codex final approval — issues #297/#298/#299 auto-close on merge, but merge requires user + Codex approval
Adapter implementation (Leptos/Dioxus color-* components) explicitly out of scope for #297-299
ColorValue spec location could be promoted to spec/shared/color-types.md — deferred as orthogonal to impl correctness
MessageFn From impls for color signatures not reflected in foundation i18n spec (04-internationalization.md)
Color wheel spec ARIA tables have cosmetic markdown alignment warnings (MD060) introduced by spec-sync agent
